name: @streamhaul/web-viewer
description: Streamhaul browser viewer/control UI (P5-2): WebCodecs H.264 decode + canvas render (VIEW), DOM input capture -> SHP (CONTROL), H.264 negotiation. A thin TS shell over the Rust/wasm bridges (sh-wasm / sh-crypto-wasm / sh-web-client).

scripts.build: npm run build:wasm && tsc --noEmit && vite build
scripts.test: npm run build:wasm && tsc --noEmit && vitest run && playwright test
